meaning: (crus的复数)[解]腿,下肢,似腿的部分
examples: The pain of waist and crura is 146(80. 7%), and double crura is 23(12.7%).

Result 17 cases of crura spastic paralysis were cured. 7 ~ 18 months follow-up shew no neopathy.
